# coolify_health (Data Source)

Retrieves the health status of the connected Coolify instance.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "coolify_health" "current" {}

output "coolify_health_status" {
  value = data.coolify_health.current.status
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `status` (String) The health status of the Coolify instance.
